2244460.name: Adventure Mosaics. Winter Holidays
2244460.description:
Ellie used to think that winter was a bad time to travel. This journey proved her wrong!

150 colored Japanese crossword puzzles of all difficulty levels, a pleasant autumn story, and charming music will help you pass the time and have a ton of fun! Puzzles are a great opportunity to challenge yourself!

Complete levels, solve puzzles, and help Ellie and her friends enjoy scenic winter locations!

- 150 colorful and memorable levels!

- Striking visual effects!

- An exciting adventure!

- Lush colors reminiscent of winter!

- Improve your logical and abstract thinking!

- User-friendly interface and addictive gameplay!
2244460.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 荷兰语, 俄语
